scripts.predev: node -e "const major=Number(process.versions.node.split('.')[0]); if (major >= 25) { console.error('This project should be run with Node 24 LTS or 22 LTS. Current Node: ' + process.versions.node); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.dev: set WATCHPACK_POLLING=true&& set CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=1&& next dev --webpack --hostname 0.0.0.0 --port 3000
scripts.dev:webpack: set WATCHPACK_POLLING=true&& set CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=1&& next dev --webpack --hostname 0.0.0.0 --port 3000
